issuesFixed.description: No tribe_events posts existed in the WordPress database. FeaturedEvents block could not render any cards.
issuesFixed.fix: Seeded 5 test tribe_events posts via The Events Calendar REST API (/tribe/events/v1/events) and set featured images via /wp/v2/tribe_events/{id}.

output.approach: Used /tribe/events/v1/events POST to create events with start_date/end_date/timezone. Then used /wp/v2/tribe_events/{id} POST to attach featured_media. All events confirmed as status=publish with has-post-thumbnail class.

pageAuditResults.note: Section index 2 ('Don't Miss These Events') renders 0 cards — expected, as it likely has a manual or category filter that excludes the seeded generic events.

validationResults.note: All warnings are pre-existing in other blocks (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) and the sync warning is an expected false positive (TSX root is InspectorControls, PHP root is section — standard for editor-only controls pattern).
